en: And the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Speak to the people of Israel and say to them, I am the LORD your God.
zh: “你要告訴以色列人，對他們說：我是耶和華你們的 神。

en: You shall not do as they do in the land of Egypt, where you lived, and you shall not do as they do in the land of Canaan, to which I am bringing you. You shall not walk in their statutes.
zh: 你們從前住過的埃及地，那裡的居民的行為，你們不可隨從；我要領你們到的迦南地，那裡的居民的行為，你們也不可仿效。你們不可跟隨他們的風俗行。

en: You shall follow my rules and keep my statutes and walk in them. I am the LORD your God.
zh: 你們要遵行我的典章，謹守我的律例，要遵照奉行；我是耶和華你們的 神。

en: You shall therefore keep my statutes and my rules; if a person does them, he shall live by them: I am the LORD.
zh: 所以你們要謹守我的律例和典章；人應該遵行這些，按照它們生活，我是耶和華。

en: "None of you shall approach any one of his close relatives to uncover nakedness. I am the LORD.
zh: “你們任何人都不可親近骨肉之親，揭露她的下體；我是耶和華。

en: You shall not uncover the nakedness of your father, which is the nakedness of your mother; she is your mother, you shall not uncover her nakedness.
zh: 你不可揭露你父親的下體，就是你母親的下體；她是你的母親，你不可揭露她的下體。

en: You shall not uncover the nakedness of your father's wife; it is your father's nakedness.
zh: 你父親的妻子的下體，你不可揭露；那本是你父親的下體。

en: You shall not uncover the nakedness of your sister, your father's daughter or your mother's daughter, whether brought up in the family or in another home.
zh: 你姊妹的下體，無論是異母同父的，或是異父同母的，是在家裡生的，或是在外面生的，你都不可揭露她們的下體。

en: You shall not uncover the nakedness of your son's daughter or of your daughter's daughter, for their nakedness is your own nakedness.
zh: 你的孫女，或是你的外孫女的下體，你都不可揭露，因為她們的下體就是你自己的下體。

en: You shall not uncover the nakedness of your father's wife's daughter, brought up in your father's family, since she is your sister.
zh: 你的繼母為你父親所生的女兒的下體，是你的妹妹，你不可揭露她的下體。

en: You shall not uncover the nakedness of your father's sister; she is your father's relative.
zh: 你不可揭露你姑母的下體；她是你父親的骨肉之親。

en: You shall not uncover the nakedness of your mother's sister, for she is your mother's relative.
zh: 你不可揭露你姨母的下體；她是你母親的骨肉之親。

en: You shall not uncover the nakedness of your father's brother, that is, you shall not approach his wife; she is your aunt.
zh: 你不可揭露你叔伯的下體，不可親近他的妻子，她本是你的嬸母。

en: You shall not uncover the nakedness of your daughter-in-law; she is your son's wife, you shall not uncover her nakedness.
zh: 你不可揭露你兒媳的下體；她是你兒子的妻子，你不可揭露她的下體。

en: You shall not uncover the nakedness of your brother's wife; it is your brother's nakedness.
zh: 你不可揭露你兄弟妻子的下體；那本是你兄弟的下體。

en: You shall not uncover the nakedness of a woman and of her daughter, and you shall not take her son's daughter or her daughter's daughter to uncover her nakedness; they are relatives; it is depravity.
zh: 你不可揭露一個婦人的下體，又揭露她女兒的下體；不可娶她的孫女，或是她的外孫女，揭露她的下體；她們是骨肉之親，這是醜惡的事。

en: And you shall not take a woman as a rival wife to her sister, uncovering her nakedness while her sister is still alive.
zh: 妻子還活著的時候，你不可另娶她的姊妹，作她的情敵，揭露她的下體。

en: "You shall not approach a woman to uncover her nakedness while she is in her menstrual uncleanness.
zh: “在污穢不潔中的婦女，你不可親近她，揭露她的下體。

en: And you shall not lie sexually with your neighbor's wife and so make yourself unclean with her.
zh: 你不可與你同伴的妻子私通，因她而玷污自己。

en: You shall not give any of your children to offer them to Molech, and so profane the name of your God: I am the LORD.
zh: 你不可把你的子孫獻給摩洛，也不可褻瀆你 神的名；我是耶和華。

en: You shall not lie with a male as with a woman; it is an abomination.
zh: 你不可與男人同睡交合，像與女人同睡交合一樣，這是可憎的事。

en: And you shall not lie with any animal and so make yourself unclean with it, neither shall any woman give herself to an animal to lie with it: it is perversion.
zh: 你不可與任何走獸同睡交合，因牠而玷污自己；女人也不可站在走獸面前，與牠交合；這是逆性的事。

en: "Do not make yourselves unclean by any of these things, for by all these the nations I am driving out before you have become unclean,
zh: “你們不可讓這些事的任何一件玷污自己，因為我將要從你們面前趕出去的各族，就是被這些事玷污了自己。

en: and the land became unclean, so that I punished its iniquity, and the land vomited out its inhabitants.
zh: 連地也被玷污，所以我追討那地的罪孽，那地就把居民吐出去。

en: But you shall keep my statutes and my rules and do none of these abominations, either the native or the stranger who sojourns among you
zh: 所以，你們要謹守我的律例和典章；這一切可憎的事，無論是本地人或是在你們中間寄居的外人，一件都不可作

en: (for the people of the land, who were before you, did all of these abominations, so that the land became unclean),
lest the land vomit you out when you make it unclean, as it vomited out the nation that was before you.
zh: 免得你們玷污那地，那地就把你們吐出去，像吐出了在你們以前的各民族一樣。

en: For everyone who does any of these abominations, the persons who do them shall be cut off from among their people.
zh: 無論甚麼人，行了一件這些可憎的事，必從自己的族人中被剪除。

en: So keep my charge never to practice any of these abominable customs that were practiced before you, and never to make yourselves unclean by them: I am the LORD your God."
zh: 所以你們要謹守我的吩咐，免得你們行那些可憎的風俗，就是你們以前的人所行的，玷污了自己。我是耶和華你們的 神。”
